_doc: Routing targets in skills/proceed-with-the-recommendation.md that are NOT bundled with the continuous-improvement plugin. See docs/audits/2026-05-06-routing-target-gap.md for source plugins, licenses, and inline-fallback summaries. As of v3.8.0, all five vendored upstream companions (Obra superpowers, addy agent-skills, ruflo-swarm, oh-my-claudecode, pm-skills) are registered in .claude-plugin/marketplace.json and installable via /plugin install <name>@continuous-improvement, but their skill bodies remain optional companions until a per-skill port lands. The bin/check-routing-targets.mjs invariant fails when proceed-with-the-recommendation.md names a target that is neither bundled in plugins/continuous-improvement/skills/ nor listed here. When a target gets vendored into the plugin bundle, remove it from this list so the invariant enforces that future references resolve to the bundled copy.
